\tzpentry{ID3843}{Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3843 introduces Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\( A_{\ell m}(\mu_r) = \frac{(\ell+1)(\mu_r-1)}{(\ell+1)\mu_r + \ell} R^{2\ell+1}. \)
\]
